findings.recommendedReplacementDirection: Replace the hero art with a clearer 16:9 trade-call composition that keeps strong negative space on the left, shows one crisp phone UI, and adds believable customer-summary / routing cues for a real trade business.

assets.altText: Support visual showing a captured trade enquiry and booked follow-up beside the final Trade Receptionist call to action.
assets.currentVisualSource: Glow-only final CTA block in App.tsx with no supporting product cue | Framework: Vite + React + React Router + TypeScript | Component: App.tsx
assets.notes: Add one subtle but credible support visual showing the end-state: answered call, captured lead, and booked follow-up, without turning the CTA into a busy feature section.

assets.altText: Trade Receptionist phone interface showing answered customer calls, captured job details, and routed summaries for a trade business.
assets.currentVisualSource: Hero scene image in App.tsx using /assets/generated/landing-hero-generated.png with fallback /assets/hero-phone-upscaled-transparent.png | Framework: Vite + React + React Router + TypeScript | Component: App.tsx
assets.notes: Replace the hero art with a clearer 16:9 trade-call composition that keeps strong negative space on the left, shows one crisp phone UI, and adds believable customer-summary / routing cues for a real trade business.

assets.altText: Compact product proof showing answered calls and simple setup reassurance beside Trade Receptionist pricing.
assets.currentVisualSource: Plan cards and glow-only background in Pricing section within App.tsx | Framework: Vite + React + React Router + TypeScript | Component: App.tsx
assets.notes: Support pricing with one compact trust visual or micro-panel showing answered calls, clean summaries, and simple setup cues rather than more decorative glow.

assets.altText: Call summary panel showing captured job details and routed follow-up message for Trade Receptionist.
assets.currentVisualSource: Audio player card and glow treatment in DemoSection within App.tsx | Framework: Vite + React + React Router + TypeScript | Component: App.tsx
assets.notes: Add a supporting 16:9 proof visual showing the captured enquiry, urgency, and WhatsApp-style handoff back to the business while keeping the audio player intact.

assets.altText: Workflow showing a customer call becoming a qualified job summary and booked diary slot for a trade business.
assets.currentVisualSource: Icon-only timeline cards and compact feature cards in components/FeaturesGrid.tsx | Framework: Vite + React + React Router + TypeScript | Component: components/FeaturesGrid.tsx
assets.notes: Introduce a premium supporting 16:9 workflow visual or reusable panel that shows caller, captured details, message summary, and booked outcome in one scannable sequence.
